description_long: This rugged all-terrain vehicle features a heavily armored, angular body with reinforced panels and a robust chassis, designed for extreme environments. It is equipped with four oversized, deeply treaded tires, each wrapped with additional protective bands and spikes for enhanced traction and durability. The vehicle sports a prominent exhaust system, external piping, and a visible American flag mounted on the side, suggesting a post-apocalyptic or militarized aesthetic. The front is fortified with a heavy-duty grille and bumper, while the rear houses a large, circular exhaust port and additional armor plating. Windows are narrow and reinforced, providing protection while maintaining visibility. The overall design emphasizes durability, off-road capability, and occupant safety in hazardous urban or wilderness scenarios.
description: A heavily armored, spiked all-terrain vehicle with oversized tires, reinforced body panels, and a militarized, post-apocalyptic design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the armored body, large spiked tires, external piping, and an American flag mounted on the roof.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the reinforced grille, heavy bumper, and the aggressive stance of the wide, spiked tires.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar features as view 0, including the flag, visible exhaust system, and armored panels.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the large circular exhaust port, rear armor plating, and the back profile of the spiked tires.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tires have a knobby, aggressive tread pattern with large, protruding spikes and deep grooves, optimized for maximum grip on rough and uneven terrain.
